meta.title: Vlocity Arena — Premium Padel, Tennis & Badminton in West Jakarta
meta.description: Vlocity Arena is a premium racquet sports venue with 6 padel courts, 2 tennis courts, 2 badminton courts, and a café in West Jakarta. Book now on AYO!

hero.title: Premium Racquet Arena in West Jakarta
hero.subtitle: Padel · Tennis · Badminton · Café

about.description: Vlocity Arena is the premier racquet sports destination in West Jakarta. With world-class facilities and a welcoming atmosphere, we cater to padel, tennis, and badminton enthusiasts.

padel.title: Padel Courts
padel.description: 6 padel courts with premium lighting and top-quality glass walls, including 1 grandstand court with spectator seats.

tennis.title: Tennis Courts
tennis.description: 2 professional tennis courts with high-quality surfaces and optimal lighting.

badminton.title: Badminton Courts
badminton.description: 2 indoor badminton courts with professional flooring.

cafe.title: Café & Lounge
cafe.description: A comfortable spot to hang out or even work, while enjoying fresh food and drinks.

socialProof.ratingLabel: from 838 reviews on Google and AYO

pricing.description: Affordable pricing for a premium playing experience. Book your court now through AYO.
pricing.note: Prices may vary based on time slot and court type.

events.description: Host your corporate events, tournaments, or gatherings at Vlocity Arena. We're ready to help plan your event.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.description: The ideal venue for team building and corporate gatherings.

tournament.title: Tournaments
tournament.description: Regular tournaments for players of all levels.

location.address: KM.1, Jl. Daan Mogot No.111, RT.10/RW.2, Wijaya Kusuma, Kec. Grogol Petamburan, Jakarta, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta 11460

footer.tagline: Premium Racquet Arena in West Jakarta
